description.en: Add a working directory for file access during this session
description.zh: 为当前会话期间的文件访问添加工作目录

description.en: Enable or disable the advisor tool, which consults a second model at key moments
description.zh: 启用或禁用顾问工具，它在任务期间的关键时刻咨询第二个模型以获取指导

description.en: Create or manage subagents (edit .claude/agents/ directly)
description.zh: 运行 /agents 会打印一个提醒，要求您询问 Claude 创建或管理 subagents，或直接编辑 .claude/agents/ 或 ~/.c

description.en: Spawn a web session that watches the branch's PR and pushes fixes for CI/review comments
description.zh: 生成一个网络版 Claude Code 会话，监视当前分支的 PR，并在 CI 失败或审阅者留下评论时推送修复

description.en: Detach this session to run as a background agent and free the terminal
description.zh: 将当前会话分离以作为后台 agent 运行并释放此终端

description.en: Orchestrate large-scale changes across the codebase in parallel worktrees
description.zh: 在整个代码库中并行编排大规模更改

description.en: Branch the conversation at this point to try a different direction
description.zh: 在此点创建当前对话的分支，以便您可以尝试不同的方向而不会丢失当前的对话

description.en: Ask a quick side question without adding to the conversation
description.zh: 提出快速附加问题，无需添加到对话中

description.en: Move this session to a new working directory
description.zh: 将此会话移动到新的工作目录

description.en: Configure Claude in Chrome settings
description.zh: 配置 Claude in Chrome 设置

description.en: Load Claude API reference material for your project's language
description.zh: 为您的项目语言（Python、TypeScript、Java、Go、Ruby、C#、PHP 或 cURL）和 Managed Agents 参考加载 Claude API 参考资料

description.en: Start a new conversation with empty context
description.zh: 使用空上下文启动新对话

description.en: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and cleanups
description.zh: 审阅当前差异以查找正确性错误以及重用、简化和效率清理

description.en: Set the prompt bar color for this session
description.zh: 为当前会话设置提示栏颜色

description.en: Free up context by summarizing the conversation so far
description.zh: 通过总结到目前为止的对话来释放上下文

description.en: Open Settings to adjust theme, model, output style and more
description.zh: 打开设置界面以调整主题、模型、输出样式和其他偏好设置

description.en: Visualize current context usage as a colored grid
description.zh: 将当前上下文使用情况可视化为彩色网格

description.en: Copy the last assistant response to the clipboard
description.zh: 将最后一个助手响应复制到剪贴板

description.en: Alias for /usage
description.zh: /usage 的别名

description.en: Design guidance for charts, graphs, and dashboards
description.zh: 为图表、图形和仪表板提供设计指导

description.en: Enable debug logging and troubleshoot via the session debug log
description.zh: 为当前会话启用调试日志记录并通过读取会话调试日志来排查问题

description.en: Fan out web searches, cross-check sources, synthesize a cited report
description.zh: 在问题上展开网络搜索，获取并交叉检查来源，并综合一份引用的报告

description.en: Authorize design-system access for /design-sync
description.zh: 使用您的 claude.ai 账户授权设计系统访问权限以供 /design-sync 使用

description.en: Convert your repo's React design system and upload it to Claude Design
description.zh: 转换您的存储库的 React 设计系统并将其上传到 Claude Design，以便它生成的设计使用您的真实组件

description.en: Continue the current session in the Claude Code Desktop app
description.zh: 在 Claude Code Desktop 应用中继续当前会话

description.en: Open an interactive diff viewer for uncommitted changes and per-turn diffs
description.zh: 打开交互式差异查看器，显示未提交的更改和每轮差异

description.en: Run a setup checkup that diagnoses issues and can fix them
description.zh: 运行设置检查以诊断问题并可以修复它们

description.en: Set the model effort level
description.zh: 设置模型工作量级别

description.en: Exit the CLI
description.zh: 退出 CLI

description.en: Export the current conversation as plain text
description.zh: 将当前对话导出为纯文本

description.en: Toggle fast mode on or off
description.zh: 切换快速模式开启或关闭

description.en: Submit feedback, report a bug, or share your conversation
description.zh: 提交反馈、报告错误或分享您的对话

description.en: Build an allowlist from your transcripts to reduce permission prompts
description.zh: 扫描您的记录以查找常见的只读 Bash 和 MCP 工具调用，然后向项目 .claude/settings.json 添加优先级允许列表以减少权限提示

description.en: Toggle the focus view (last prompt, tool summary, final response)
description.zh: 切换焦点视图，仅显示您的最后一个提示、带有编辑 diffstats 的单行工具调用摘要和最终响应

description.en: Spawn a background subagent that inherits the conversation and works on a directive
description.zh: 生成一个分叉的 subagent：一个继承完整对话的后台 subagent，在您继续进行时处理该指令

description.en: Set a goal: Claude keeps working across turns until it is met
description.zh: 设置一个目标：Claude 在多个轮次中继续工作，直到满足条件

description.en: Write a JS heap snapshot and memory breakdown for diagnosing memory usage
description.zh: 将 JavaScript 堆快照和内存分解写入 ~/Desktop，或在 Linux 上没有 Desktop 文件夹的情况下写入您的主目录，以诊断高内存使用情况

description.en: Show help and available commands
description.zh: 显示帮助和可用命令

description.en: View hook configurations for tool events
description.zh: 查看工具事件的 hook 配置

description.en: Manage IDE integrations and show status
description.zh: 管理 IDE 集成并显示状态

description.en: Initialize the project with a CLAUDE.md guide
description.zh: 使用 CLAUDE.md 指南初始化项目

description.en: Generate a report analyzing your Claude Code sessions
description.zh: 生成报告，分析您的 Claude Code 会话，包括项目领域、交互模式和摩擦点

description.en: Install the Claude GitHub App for a repository
description.zh: 为存储库安装 Claude GitHub App，可选步骤设置 GitHub Actions 工作流和密钥

description.en: Install the Claude Slack app
description.zh: 安装 Claude Slack 应用

description.en: Open your keyboard shortcuts file
description.zh: 打开您的快捷键文件

description.en: Sign in to your Anthropic account
description.zh: 登录到您的 Anthropic 账户

description.en: Sign out from your Anthropic account
description.zh: 从您的 Anthropic 账户登出

description.en: Run a prompt repeatedly while the session stays open
description.zh: 在会话保持打开状态时重复运行提示

description.en: Manage MCP server connections and OAuth authentication
description.zh: 管理 MCP server 连接和 OAuth 身份验证

description.en: Edit CLAUDE.md memory files and manage auto-memory
description.zh: 编辑 CLAUDE.md 内存文件，启用或禁用 auto-memory，并查看自动内存条目

description.en: Show a QR code to download the Claude mobile app
description.zh: 显示二维码以下载 Claude 移动应用

description.en: Switch the AI model and save it as your default
description.zh: 切换 AI 模型并将其保存为新会话的默认值

description.en: Share a free week of Claude Code with friends
description.zh: 与朋友分享一周免费的 Claude Code

description.en: Manage allow, ask, and deny rules for tool permissions
description.zh: 管理工具权限的允许、询问和拒绝规则

description.en: Switch into Plan Mode
description.zh: 直接从提示进入 Plan Mode

description.en: Manage Claude Code plugins
description.zh: 管理 Claude Code plugins

description.en: Discover Claude Code features via quick interactive lessons
description.zh: 通过带有动画演示的快速交互式课程发现 Claude Code 功能

description.en: Removed in v2.1.91
description.zh: 在 v2.1.91 中移除

description.en: View and update your privacy settings
description.zh: 查看和更新您的隐私设置

description.en: Open the Claude FM lo-fi radio in your browser
description.zh: 在浏览器中打开 Claude FM lo-fi 电台

description.en: Generate a one-line summary of the current session on demand
description.zh: 按需生成当前会话的单行摘要

description.en: View the changelog in an interactive version picker
description.zh: 在交互式版本选择器中查看更改日志

description.en: Reload all active plugins without restarting
description.zh: 重新加载所有活跃 plugins 以应用待处理的更改而无需重启

description.en: Rescan skill and command directories mid-session
description.zh: 重新扫描 skill 和命令目录，以便在会话期间添加或更改的 skills 在磁盘上变得可用，无需重启

description.en: Make this session remotely controllable from claude.ai
description.zh: 使此会话可从 claude.ai 进行远程控制

description.en: Choose the default environment for cloud agents
description.zh: 为云 agents 选择默认环境

description.en: Rename the current session and show the name on the prompt bar
description.zh: 重命名当前会话并在提示栏上显示名称

description.en: Resume a conversation by id or name, or open the picker
description.zh: 按 ID 或名称恢复对话，或打开会话选择器

description.en: Fast single-pass read-only review of a GitHub pull request
description.zh: 按编号运行 GitHub pull request 的快速单遍、只读审阅

description.en: Roll conversation and/or code back to an earlier point
description.zh: 将对话和/或代码倒回到上一个点，或从选定的消息进行总结

description.en: Launch and drive your project app to see changes working live
description.zh: 启动并驱动您的项目应用以在运行的应用中看到更改工作，而不仅仅是在测试中

description.en: Teach /run and /verify how to build, start and probe each project
description.zh: 通过从干净环境编写每个项目的 skill，教 /run 和 /verify 如何构建、启动和驱动您的项目应用

description.en: Toggle sandbox mode
description.zh: 切换 sandbox mode

description.en: Create, update, list, or run routines on Anthropic-managed infra
description.zh: 创建、更新、列出或运行 routines，这些 routines 在 Anthropic 管理的云基础设施上执行

description.en: Adjust mouse wheel scroll speed interactively
description.zh: 交互式调整鼠标滚轮滚动速度，使用标尺，您可以在对话框打开时滚动以预览更改

description.en: Analyze pending changes on the branch for security vulnerabilities
description.zh: 分析当前分支上的待处理更改以查找安全漏洞

description.en: Configure Amazon Bedrock auth, region and model pinning
description.zh: 通过交互式向导配置 Amazon Bedrock 身份验证、区域和模型固定

description.en: Configure Google Cloud Agent Platform auth and project
description.zh: 通过交互式向导配置 Google Cloud 的 Agent Platform 身份验证、项目、区域和模型固定

description.en: Cleanup-only review that applies fixes without hunting for bugs
description.zh: 审阅更改的代码以查找清理机会并应用修复

description.en: List available skills
description.zh: 列出可用的 skills

description.en: Alias for /usage
description.zh: /usage 的别名

description.en: Open Settings (status tab): version, model, account, connectivity
description.zh: 打开设置界面（状态选项卡），显示版本、模型、账户和连接性

description.en: Configure Claude Code's status line
description.zh: 配置 Claude Code 的状态行

description.en: Order Claude Code stickers
description.zh: 订购 Claude Code 贴纸

description.en: Stop the current background session
description.zh: 停止当前后台会话

description.en: View and manage background work, including finished subagents
description.zh: 查看和管理后台工作中的所有内容，包括已完成的 subagents

description.en: Generate a team onboarding guide from your usage history
description.zh: 从您的 Claude Code 使用历史记录生成团队入职指南

description.en: Pull a Claude Code web session into this terminal
description.zh: 将网络版 Claude Code 会话拉入此终端：打开选择器，然后获取分支和对话

description.en: Configure terminal keybindings for Shift+Enter and more
description.zh: 为 Shift+Enter 和其他快捷键配置终端快捷键

description.en: Change the color theme
description.zh: 更改颜色主题

description.en: Set the terminal UI renderer and restart into it
description.zh: 设置终端 UI 渲染器并使用您的对话完整性重新启动到它

description.en: Draft a plan in an ultraplan session, review in browser, execute remotely
description.zh: 在 ultraplan 会话中起草计划，在浏览器中审阅，然后远程执行或将其发送回您的终端

description.en: Run a deep multi-agent code review in a cloud sandbox
description.zh: 在云沙箱中运行深度、多 agent 代码审阅，使用 ultrareview

description.en: Open the upgrade page to switch to a higher plan tier
description.zh: 打开升级页面在您的浏览器中以切换到更高的计划层级

description.en: Show session cost, plan usage limits, and activity stats
description.zh: 显示会话成本、计划使用限制和活动统计

description.en: Configure usage credits to keep working past limits
description.zh: 配置使用额度以在达到限制时继续工作

description.en: Confirm code changes work by building, running and observing the app
description.zh: 通过构建您的项目应用、运行它并观察结果来确认代码更改是否按预期工作，而不是依赖测试或类型检查

description.en: Removed in v2.1.92
description.zh: 在 v2.1.92 中移除

description.en: Toggle voice dictation, or enable a specific mode
description.zh: 切换语音听写，或在特定模式下启用它

description.en: Connect your GitHub account to Claude Code on the web
description.zh: 使用您的本地 gh CLI 凭证将您的 GitHub 账户连接到网络版 Claude Code

description.en: Open the workflow progress view to monitor and manage workflows
description.zh: 打开工作流进度视图以监视、暂停、恢复或保存运行中和已完成的工作流
